title: Argument to $close can't be an expression

features.name: fclose with expression argument
features.description: Code should include a $fclose system task call with an expression (not just identifier) as its argument, such as a bitwise OR of file descriptors

features.name: fclose with concatenation expression argument
features.description: Code should include a $fclose system task call with a concatenation expression as its argument, where the concatenation contains an OR expression
